title: Enterprise-managed auth for MCP connectors
summary: Anthropic released enterprise-managed authentication for MCP connectors, allowing admins to authorize and authenticate connectors organization-wide through identity providers without requiring individual user setup. This centralizes connector authentication at the enterprise level.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's enterprise-managed authentication for MCP connectors, which lets administrators authorize and authenticate connectors across an organization through identity providers rather than relying on individual setup. It matters because it shifts connector access from per-user configuration to centralized admin control. The key takeaway is a streamlined onboarding path that runs from admin configuration to an employee's first login.
